de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2

Class SExprs

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2.SExprs

  • public class SExprs
extends java.lang.Object
    This class is a collection of static functions to construct SExpr objects.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static SExpr FALSE
      The constant "false" of type Bool
      static java.lang.String SORT_PREFIX
      The string prefix used for sort names in SMT,
      static SExpr TRUE
      The constant "true" of type Bool
      static SExpr ZERO
      The constant "0" of type Int

      Produce a cast expression
      static java.util.List<SExpr> coerce(java.util.List<SExpr> exprs, SExpr.Type type)
      Takes a list of SExprs and converts it to a list of the given type, if possible.

      Takes an SExpression and converts it to the given type, if possible.

      Produce a universal quantification.

      Produce a smt matching pattern.

      Collects the :pattern annations from any nesting depth in a term and brings it to toplevel.

    • Field Detail

      • SORT_PREFIX

        public static final java.lang.String SORT_PREFIX
        The string prefix used for sort names in SMT,
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • TRUE

        public static final SExpr TRUE
        The constant "true" of type Bool

      • FALSE

        public static final SExpr FALSE
        The constant "false" of type Bool

      • ZERO

        public static final SExpr ZERO
        The constant "0" of type Int

    • Method Detail

      • and

        public static SExpr and(java.util.List<SExpr> clauses)
        Produce a conjunction of SExprs. There is some optimisation regarding the nature of the list of expressions: If it is empty, the result is "true". If it is a singleton, it is this single expression.
        Parameters:
        clauses - non-null list of boolean expression
        Returns:
        an SExpr equivalent to the conjunction of the clauses.

      • imp

        public static SExpr imp(SExpr ante,
                        SExpr cons)
        Produce an implication from an assumption and a conclusion.

        There is some optimisation if there are constants involved.

        If the assumption is false, the result is true. If the assumption is true, the result is the conclusion. If the conclusion is true, the result is true. If the conclusion is false, the result is the negation of the assumption.

        Parameters:
        ante - a boolean expression
        cons - a boolean expression
        Returns:
        a boolean expression equivalent to the implication (=> ante concl)

      • forall

        public static SExpr forall(java.util.List<SExpr> vars,
                           SExpr matrix)
                    throws SMTTranslationException
        Produce a universal quantification. If vars is empty: no quantifiers are produced and if the matrix has a pattern, the pattern is removed.
        Parameters:
        vars - a list of variable declarations (var Type)
        matrix - a boolean expression
        Returns:
        Throws:
        SMTTranslationException

      • coerce

        public static SExpr coerce(SExpr exp,
                           SExpr.Type type)
                    throws SMTTranslationException
        Takes an SExpression and converts it to the given type, if possible.
        Parameters:
        exp - the SExpression to convert
        type - the desired type
        Returns:
        The same SExpr, but with the desired type
        Throws:
        SMTTranslationException - if an impossible conversion is attempted

      • coerce

        public static java.util.List<SExpr> coerce(java.util.List<SExpr> exprs,
                                           SExpr.Type type)
                                    throws SMTTranslationException
        Takes a list of SExprs and converts it to a list of the given type, if possible.
        Parameters:
        exprs - the list to convert
        type - the desired target type
        Returns:
        A fresh list with the same SExpr, but with the desired type
        Throws:
        SMTTranslationException - if an impossible conversion is attempted

      • patternSExpr

        public static SExpr patternSExpr(SExpr e,
                                 SExpr... patterns)
        Produce a smt matching pattern. The result is (! e :patterns ((patterns)). If the list is empty, then e is returned.
        Parameters:
        e - the expression to wrap
        patterns - a possibly empty list of expressions
        Returns:
        the expanded pattern with the same type as e

      • patternSExpr

        public static SExpr patternSExpr(SExpr e,
                                 java.util.List<SExpr> patterns)
        Produce a smt matching pattern. The result is (! e :patterns ((patterns)). If the list is empty, then e is returned.
        Parameters:
        e - the expression to wrap
        patterns - a possibly empty collection of expressions
        Returns:
        the expanded pattern with the same type as e

      • sortExpr

        public static SExpr sortExpr(Sort sort)
        Turn a KeY sort into an SMT sort (by prefixing SORT_PREFIX.
        Parameters:
        sort - the sort to translate to SMT
        Returns:
        an SEXpr representing the sort (of type T)

      • castExpr

        public static SExpr castExpr(SExpr sortExp,
                             SExpr exp)
                      throws SMTTranslationException
        Produce a cast expression
        Parameters:
        sortExp - the sort as an SExpr
        exp - the expression to cast
        Returns:
        a cast of type exp to sort sortExp
        Throws:
        SMTTranslationException - if coercion fails

      • assertion

        public static SExpr assertion(SExpr assertion)
                       throws SMTTranslationException
        Produce an anssertion. The argument will be coerced to Bool.
        Parameters:
        assertion - the SExpr to wrap.
        Returns:
        a freshly created assert SExpr.
        Throws:
        SMTTranslationException - if coercion fails

      • pullOutPatterns

        public static SExpr pullOutPatterns(SExpr matrix)
        Collects the :pattern annations from any nesting depth in a term and brings it to toplevel. Example: 
             (and (! (.A.) :pattern ((p1))) (! (.B.) :pattern ((p2))) )
        yields 
             (! (and (.A.) (.B:)) :pattern ((p1)(p2)))
        Parameters:
        matrix - the SExpr to pull the patterns from
        Returns:
        either matrix (if no patterns present) or a term (!... :pattern ...)

      • instanceOf

        public static SExpr instanceOf(SExpr var,
                               SExpr sortExpr)

      • greaterEqual

        public static SExpr greaterEqual(SExpr a,
                                 SExpr b)
                          throws SMTTranslationException
        Throws:
        SMTTranslationException

        public static SExpr lessEqual(SExpr a,
                              SExpr b)
                       throws SMTTranslationException
        Throws:
        SMTTranslationException

        public static SExpr lessThan(SExpr a,
                             SExpr b)
                      throws SMTTranslationException
        Throws:
        SMTTranslationException

      • eq

        public static SExpr eq(SExpr a,
                       SExpr b)
                throws SMTTranslationException
        Throws:
        SMTTranslationException

        public static SExpr minus(SExpr a,
                          SExpr b)
                   throws SMTTranslationException
        Throws:
        SMTTranslationException

      • plus

        public static SExpr plus(SExpr a,
                         SExpr b)
                  throws SMTTranslationException
        Throws:
        SMTTranslationException

                        SExpr _then,
